nasb.text: “You only have I chosen among all the families of the earth; Therefore I will punish you for all your iniquities.”

esv.text: “You only have I known of all the families of the earth; therefore I will punish you for all your iniquities.

cnv.text: “地上萬族中， 我只揀選了你； 因此，我必追討你們的一切罪。”

ccb.text: ‘世上万族之中，我只拣选了你们， 所以我要因你们的罪恶而惩罚你们。’”
